chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-1196 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.24370/2024 2. For order as to non-prosecution CMA No.10239/24 3. For order on office objection 4. For hearing of CMA No.5593/2024 5. For hearing of main case 06.10.2025 Ms. Wajiha M. Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General --------- This matter was last taken up on 19.08.2024 which is over one year ago. On the last date of hearing, Mr. Muhammad Pannah Maitlo, advocate appeared for the petitioner and he is not on general adjournment today. He has failed to pursue this petition diligently in the last one year. Today, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without any intimation despite his name appearing in the cause list. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alonwith pending application(s). Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
